steps.title: Identify the key cause and effect
steps.content: The passage states: water evaporates from the crust, creating voids that oil fills, thereby increasing fat content. This directly links moisture loss to fat increase.

steps.title: Apply the logic to less moisture loss
steps.content: If less moisture is lost, fewer voids form, so less oil fills them—meaning less fat increase. Choice B expresses this directly: “the less the fat content is increased through frying.” The other choices reverse the logic, shift focus, or introduce unsupported details. That matches choice B — B is correct.
